title: January 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}
'''January 2''' is the second day of the calendar year. 363 days (364 in leap years) remain in the year.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[John Considine]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 97|''Star Wars Weekly'' 97]] published.
*1980 – [[Georgina Cordova]] is born.
*[[1996]] – [[Heir to the Empire 4|''Heir to the Empire'' 4]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 4|''Empire'' 4]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Frank Kelly Freas]] dies.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0½|''Star Wars: Legacy 0½'']] published.
*2008 – [[Legacy (2006) 18|''Legacy'' (2006) 18]] published.
*[[2009]] – "[[Dooku Captured]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Bait]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2019]] – [[Age of Republic - Obi-Wan Kenobi 1|''Age of Republic - Obi-Wan Kenobi'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Han Solo - Imperial Cadet 3|''Han Solo - Imperial Cadet'' 3]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars: Darth Vader – Black, White & Red (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Darth Vader – Black, White & Red'' Treasury Edition]] published.
*2024 – ''[[Young Jedi Adventures: The Jellyfruit Pursuit]]'' published.
